tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: Laboratory results show borderline elevated HbA1c (5.9%), indicating prediabetes. Glucose is mildly low (66.1 mg/dL), which may be due to fasting or other factors. Chloride is slightly elevated (109 mmol/L), but other electrolytes, renal function, and calcium are within normal limits. No acute abnormalities; recommend clinical correlation and monitoring of glucose metabolism.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
